prompt: Create a bright Y2K anime fashion illustration on a clean white background, low-angle full-body view of a stylish young woman lounging diagonally in a transparent neon acrylic rattan chair. The character has dark charcoal twin-tail hair with teal highlights, a face intentionally covered by a soft peach square blur, oversized iridescent rainbow visor sunglasses pushed over the eyes, large blue hoop earrings, and glossy makeup/fashion-model energy. Outfit: exactly 7 main wearable pieces: a translucent hot-pink crystalline puffer jacket, an iridescent white-blue cropped top, matching iridescent mini shorts, glossy white thigh-high leggings, two chunky white leg warmers, and two pastel blue-pink-white platform sneakers with straps and laces. Pose: relaxed and confident, leaning back with one arm draped over the chair arm, one hand lifting the visor, legs stretched toward the viewer with one sneaker very large in the foreground. Chair: exactly 1 translucent neon chair with 4 tubular legs, 2 rounded armrests, a woven circular back and seat, made of clear acrylic that refracts lime green, cyan, yellow, and pink. Lighting: pristine high-key studio light with sharp iridescent reflections, glossy highlights, pastel rainbow caustics, and a vivid multicolor shadow puddle on the floor beneath the chair. Style: ultra-clean niji-style anime line art, delicate thin outlines, high-detail fashion rendering, glasslike transparency, holographic materials, candy-colored Y2K palette of white, cyan, lime, bubblegum pink, and pearl iridescence, no text, no watermark, no background clutter.
